titleStmt.title: SII 31.204: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 204. (A.R. No. B 316 of 1938.) GŌRANṬLA, KARNOOL TALUK AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: Base of the dhvajastaṁbha set up in front of the Vīrabhadrasvāmi temple.
It is dated in Śaka 1474, Parīdhāvi, Chaitra, śu. 3 corresponding to Monday, March, 28, 1552 A.D.

It registers the gift of the Vīramushṭhi-pannu, which is supposed to be collected from the village Gōranṭla situated in the Dōni-sīma. by three Vīramūshṭhis namely Viramushthi Hucha Vīraya, Avarada Kamcha Vīraya and Śivayōgi Liṅgaya with the permission of Śiva Sidhabhikshāvritti ayyavāru. The entire gift is given to the god Vīrabhadra.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavarṣaṁbulu 1474 Agunēṭi parīdhāvi saṁvatsara caitra śu 3 lu śrīmatunamastuṁgaśiraḥ
cuṁbi caṁdracāmara cāravē trailōkya nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svastiśrī parvata śrīsvayaṁbhū śrīliṁga cakravartti śrīmaṁnnalikārjuna mahādēvuni divya śrīkailāsaṁ mīdi dēhapṛdhivī mahāmahaṁttu mukhyamainaśrī Ajātivīra śivaśidha
bhikṣāvritti Ayyavāri Ānatini . vīramuṣṭhi hucavīraya komāra Avaradakaṁca vīraya sivayōgi liṁgayagāru jana 3 nnu
kramameṭlannanu dōnisīmalō cellē gōraṁṭlagrāmā
nanu māku cellē dīpāradhanakunnu Āpaiḍi dhāravōsi Istimi . I rokhaṁ yāvīramuṣḍi vaci kāśagaṭṭi Ārokhaṁ Aḍiginānu vibhūti rudākṣaku vōragura . I rokhaṁ Igrāmānagala vīrā bhadraniki Ācaṁdrārkagānu dhāravōsi Iccina tharmmaśāsanaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 31.204 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
